data.title: High Times Magazine Executive Pleads Guilty In Securities Fraud Scheme - $20 Million From 'Investor-Victims'
data.description: According to Adam Levin's plea agreement, in 2020 and 2021 'Hightimes raised approximately $20 million from more than 10 investor-victims.'

data.title: Millions Of Public Employees To See Boosted Social Security Payments After Biden Signed Social Security Fairness Act Into Law
$125 Million Home of Luminar CEO Gutted in LA Wildfires After Week of Gains for Company
data.description: The most expensive home in California's Pacific Palisades, owned by Luminar Technologies CEO Austin Russell, has been ravaged by the ongoing Los Angeles wildfires.

data.title: They've Turned Into Socialists – Caller Tells Dave Ramsey She's 'Giving Up' On Her Daughters After Spending Over $500,000 On Their College

data.description: Top performers in last week's stock market: Walgreens, Constellation Energy, FTAI Aviation, TD SYNNEX, Aurora Innovation, Royalty Pharma, Micron, Delta Air Lines, Intra-Cellular Therapies, United Airlines.
